name: PlayStation 5 Slim Digital Edition
description: Experience lightning-fast loading with an ultra-high speed SSD, deeper immersion with support for haptic feedback, adaptive triggers, and 3D Audio.

name: Xbox Series X 1TB Console
description: The fastest, most powerful Xbox ever. Play thousands of titles from four generations of consoles—all games look and play best on Xbox Series X.

name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Noise Canceling Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise cancellation optimized automatically based on your wearing conditions and environment. Magnificent sound quality engineered to perfection.

name: Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Generation)
description: Features up to two times more Active Noise Cancellation, plus Adaptive Audio and Personalized Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking for immersive sound.

name: iPhone 15 Pro Max 256GB
description: Forged in titanium and featuring the groundbreaking A17 Pro chip, a customizable Action button, and the most powerful iPhone camera system ever.

name: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra
description: Welcome to the era of mobile AI. With Galaxy S24 Ultra in your hands, you can unleash whole new levels of creativity, productivity and possibility.

name: MacBook Air 13-inch M3
description: Strikingly thin design. Blazing fast speeds with the Apple M3 chip. Built for Apple Intelligence to transform how you work, create, and play.

name: ASUS ROG Zephyrus G14 Gaming Laptop
description: Powerful AMD Ryzen processor paired with high-performance NVIDIA GeForce RTX graphics inside a highly compact, lightweight 14-inch metal chassis.

name: LG C3 65-inch 4K OLED Smart TV
description: The advanced LG OLED evo C-Series is powered by the α9 AI Processor Gen6 for exceptional picture quality, infinite contrast, and spectacular brightness.

name: Fujifilm X-T5 Mirrorless Camera
description: A high-resolution, photography-focused mirrorless camera featuring a classic retro dial layout and a magnificent 40.2-megapixel X-Trans CMOS 5 HR sensor.

name: Philips Hue Smart Lighting Starter Kit
description: Automate your home lighting setup easily. Includes three smart color LED bulbs and the Hue Bridge hub for seamless integration with Alexa, Google Home, and Apple Home.

name: Apple Watch Series 9 GPS
description: Your essential companion for a healthy lifestyle is now even more capable. Features the S9 SiP chip, a magic new way to use your watch without touching the screen, and a brighter display.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse
description: An iconic ergonomic performance mouse remastered. Feel every moment of your workflow with even more precision, tactile feedback, and 8K DPI tracking on any surface.
